analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that President Putin will not attend the UN General Assembly in person due to an unstable epidemiological situation in the US and will address the session via video. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent): The tweet mentions the US epidemiological situation as unstable but does not frame the US or the West as immoral, hostile, or decadent; it's a neutral logistical explanation. Not promoted. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): No claim about alternative systems or multilateral leadership; only attendance format. Not promoted. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): No content about cooperation, peace, or partnership. Not promoted. RU4 (Russian history admirable): No historical references. Not promoted. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No boasting of achievements or superiority. Not promoted. RU6 (Russia culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is informational without promoting any listed narrative.
